description.value: RAKIRO BIOTECH SYSTEMS PRIVATE LIMITED is a dedicated manufacturer based in Navi Mumbai, offering a comprehensive range of essential industrial and testing solutions. Their product portfolio includes Combination Kits, Water Test Kits, Cooling Chemicals, Speciality Chemicals, Industrial Electrodes, and Online Meters, catering to diverse client requirements with reliable and high-quality products.

address.value: R466 TTC Ind Area Rabale Midc, Navi Mumbai (New Mumbai), India, 400701

visual_features.presentation: White background studio with light blue gradient
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Brand name 'AQUASOL' and slogan 'Analyzing Waters Anytime... Anywhere...' visible on cases and product packaging. 'Water Testing Kit' text overlay.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a comprehensive water testing kit, featuring multiple blue rectangular boxes, several multi-colored test strips and charts, and two black zippered carrying cases, all branded with 'AQUASOL'. The items are arranged on a clean, light blue to white gradient background, with the text 'Water Testing Kit' prominently displayed above the products.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A comprehensive Aquasol water testing kit with blue boxes, test strips, color charts, and black carrying cases on a gradient background.

visual_features.presentation: Industrial facility background with text and logo overlays
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The image includes the 'UDAAQ COMPLETE WATER SOLUTIONS' company logo and text 'Food Grade Cooling Water Treatment Chemicals' as overlays.

media_assets.visual_description: The image features an industrial water treatment facility with large blue corrugated tanks, green pipes, and yellow stairs under a bright sky. Overlaid on the image are the 'UDAAQ COMPLETE WATER SOLUTIONS' logo at the top and large grey text stating 'Food Grade Cooling Water Treatment Chemicals'. A prominent blue circular 'NSF' certification logo with a white glow is centered in the lower half of the image.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Industrial water treatment facility with blue tanks and green pipes, overlaid with 'UDAAQ' logo, 'Food Grade Cooling Water Treatment Chemicals' text, and 'NSF' certification logo.

visual_features.presentation: graphic design with blurred laboratory background
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Image features text overlays 'Food Grade Chemicals', 'Anti-Foamer', 'AHU Cleaner', 'Cleaner', and 'Resin Cleaner'. It also displays the 'UDAAQ COMPLETE WATER SOLUTIONS' logo and an 'NSF' certification logo. The background consists of blurred test tubes and a dropper dispensing a yellowish liquid.

media_assets.visual_description: The image is a promotional graphic featuring text overlays on a blurred background of laboratory equipment. The main text reads "Food Grade Chemicals" with sub-categories like "Anti-Foamer", "AHU Cleaner", "Cleaner", and "Resin Cleaner". In the background, multiple clear test tubes are visible, along with a dropper dispensing a yellowish liquid into one of them.

visual_features.shape_visible: Cylindrical, elongated, with various tips and threaded sections

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: "AQUASOL DIGITAL" logo and "Industrial Electrode" text are prominent.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays two industrial electrodes, depicted as graphic illustrations. The electrode on the left is a silver-colored cylindrical probe with a black threaded base and a cable extending from it. The electrode on the right is a longer, black cylindrical device with a split tip revealing a small metallic sensor, also connected to a cable. Both are presented against a light blue gradient background, with the "AQUASOL DIGITAL" logo and "Industrial Electrode" text overlaid at the top.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Two industrial electrodes, one silver cylindrical probe and one black cylindrical device with a split tip, on a light blue background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Digital display showing '0 PPM' and '25.0 °C', brand 'AQUASOL DIGITAL', model 'AO-TDS-01', control buttons for 'CAL', 'MODE SET', and arrows.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a black and blue digital online meter, angled slightly to the right, against a soft pink and purple gradient background. The meter features a prominent blue front panel with a light blue LCD screen showing '0 PPM' and '25.0 °C', along with the model number 'AO-TDS-01' and 'AQUASOL' branding. Below the screen are several control buttons labeled 'CAL', 'MODE SET', and arrow icons, indicating a functional electronic device presented in a clean, studio-like setting with overlaid text.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A black and blue Aquasol Digital online meter with an LCD screen displaying '0 PPM' and '25.0 °C' on a gradient background.

reviews.author: Zolo
reviews.text:
This has been the worst experience I've had with a water treatment chemicals supplier Rakiro Aquasol. They repeatedly promise delivery in 4-5 days, but I've often waited over 10 days without any dispatch. When I follow up, they claim it will ship that day, only for it to take an additional 5 days.

To make matters worse, there’s no technical support available, and when I finally spoke with the technical manager after delays of 10-15 days, the communication was unprofessional and dismissive. I highly recommend looking for alternatives in the water treatment chemical industry.

reviews.author: Amit Agashe
reviews.text: I am using DO and CO2 test kits. Products are really good. User friendly and accurate.

reviews.author: Ramu Thakur
reviews.text:
Enjoyed working with this company

Amazing service. Would recommend to everyone.

Best organization

reviews.author: Yoshita Dave
reviews.text: Rakiro is my family since years. The best in water treatment facilities. God bless

reviews.author: Roohi Menon
reviews.text: Very high tech. I was impressed with their precision and happy and healthy atmosphere.

reviews.author: Anshu Pathak
reviews.text: Amazing service. Would recommend to everyone.

To make matters worse, there’s no technical support available, and when I finally spoke with the technical manager after delays of 10-15 days, the communication was unprofessional and dismissive. I highly recommend looking for alternatives in the water treatment chemical industry.

plan_execution.reasoning: Seller has a good number of products and a well-populated company profile. Reviews API is not present, so skipping the reviews agent. Following the standard flow of company enrichment, product enrichment, deduplication, and catalog writing.
